name: S P V I Public Company Limited
summary: S P V I Public Company Limited engages in the distribution of computers, mobile phones, and related accessories and services in Thailand. It also resells Apple products, including computers, iOS devices, and various other accessories. In addition, the company distributes products compatible with Apple, such as hard drives for video storage, portable hard drives, and printed and graphic products; and products associated with iOS devices comprising speakers, headphones, protective cases, and screen protectors. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 57 branches. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
